info.name: Preelly — Payment Gateway (CCAvenue)
info.description:
Payment gateway integration for the Preelly mobile app.

Flow:
1. (optional) GET checkout summary to show the payable amount.
2. (optional) POST coupon validate to apply a discount.
3. POST /payment/initiate → returns paymentUrl + encRequest + accessCode.
4. Open a WebView/Custom Tab and POST encRequest + access_code to paymentUrl.
5. CCAvenue redirects to the API callback, which 302s to a success/failure URL — detect it in the WebView and close it.
6. GET /payment/transaction/:orderId to confirm the final status.
7. GET /payment/invoice/:orderId to download the PDF invoice (owner only).

Auth: all app-facing calls use a Bearer JWT (Authorization: Bearer {{token}}). The /ccavenue/callback endpoint is called by CCAvenue, not the app.

request.description: Public. Returns active packages (id, packageName, packageAmount, isVatApplicable, vatAmount, packageFeatures, isRecomended). Use a package's id as packageId.
Public. Returns active storage-facility durations (id, facilityWeek, facilityAmount). Optional add-on; use an id as storageFacilityId.
JWT, owner-only. Returns the priced order summary: data.summary { packageAmount, storageAmount, vatPercentage, vatValue, total, currency }. Amount is computed server-side.

JWT. On success: data { valid:true, discountAmount, finalAmount, message }. On rejection: success:false with the reason in `message` (expired, limit reached, not applicable, etc.). orderAmount = pre-VAT base (packageAmount + storageAmount).

JWT, owner-only. Required: productId, packageId. Optional: storageFacilityId, couponCode.

Returns data { orderId, amount, currency, paymentUrl, accessCode, encRequest }.

MOBILE: open a WebView and POST two fields to paymentUrl — `encRequest`={{data.encRequest}} and `access_code`={{data.accessCode}}. The amount is authoritative (recomputed server-side); do not send it from the client.

JWT, owner-only. Returns data { orderStatus (INITIATED|SUCCESS|FAILED|CANCELLED|PENDING), trackingId, amount, currency, paymentMode, paymentDate, invoiceNumber, invoiceUrl, hasInvoice, product, package, storageFacility, failureMessage }. Poll this after the WebView closes to confirm the outcome.

JWT, owner-only. Streams application/pdf (Content-Disposition: attachment). Only available for a SUCCESS transaction; regenerates the file automatically if missing. In Postman use 'Send and Download' to save the PDF.

item.name: CCAvenue Callback (gateway → server; NOT called by the app)

request.description: Documented for reference only. CCAvenue POSTs `encResp` here after payment; the server decrypts it, updates the transaction, and 302-redirects to the success/failure page. The mobile app never calls this — set redirect_url to this endpoint via BASE_URL in the server env.
